allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node | Select-Object Source; \(Get-Command node\).Source; & node --version; Get-Command npx | Select-Object Source; Get-Command npm | Select-Object Source)
PowerShell(where.exe node; "---"; where.exe npm; "---"; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node' -or $_ -match 'nvm' }; "--- npm prefix ---"; npm config get prefix)
